commit_message:
[rom_ctrl, rtl] Outstanding request fix [rom_ctrl, rtl] Outstanding request fix ** Fixed the outstanding parameter to 1 in rom_ctrl as only one request
   is accepted by rom_ctrl SRAM.

** Fixed the depth of the fifos from 2 to 1 in rom_ctrl_common_vseq due
   to the reason above.
